# Contract — `AnalyticsCustomEvent`

**Feature**: `004-custom-events`
**Date**: 2026-05-18
**Stability**: public; new in slice 004. Pinned via the existing `PublicSurfacePinningTests` baseline (regenerated by slice 004).

The consumer-facing immutable projection of an `analyzerCustomEvent` row, returned by `IAnalyticsEventStateProvider.CurrentRequestCustomEvents` for in-process consumers within the request scope.

## Namespace

```
Analyzer.Analytics.AnalyticsCustomEvent
```

Joins `AnalyticsEventReceipt`, `AnalyticsSession`, `IAnalyticsEventStateProvider` in the pinned namespace.

## Shape

```csharp
namespace Analyzer.Analytics;

public sealed record AnalyticsCustomEvent(
    Guid EventKey,
    Guid SessionKey,
    Guid VisitorProfileKey,
    Guid? ReceiptKey,
    string Category,
    string Action,
    string? Label,
    decimal? Value,
    DateTimeOffset ReceivedUtc);
```

9 positional properties; XML docs per data-model §2.

### Property semantics

| Property | Type | Semantics |
|---|---|---|
| `EventKey` | `Guid` | Publicly-exposed stable handle. Matches the DB row's `eventKey`. Returned by HTTP 202 body. |
| `SessionKey` | `Guid` | Hard FK to `AnalyticsSession.SessionKey`. Always non-empty. |
| `VisitorProfileKey` | `Guid` | Hard FK to `customizerVisitorProfile.key`. Always non-empty. |
| `ReceiptKey` | `Guid?` | Soft FK to `AnalyticsEventReceipt.Id`. Null in 99% of real flows; populated only in the rare in-request co-capture case. |
| `Category` | `string` | Operator-defined. 1..64 chars; non-whitespace-only. |
| `Action` | `string` | Operator-defined. 1..64 chars; non-whitespace-only. |
| `Label` | `string?` | Operator-defined. Up to 256 chars when present. |
| `Value` | `decimal?` | Operator-defined numeric. `decimal(18,4)`. |
| `ReceivedUtc` | `DateTimeOffset` | When the management endpoint observed the request. Sourced from injected `TimeProvider`. |

## Versioning

**Public, pinned, stable** at slice 004. MINOR-additive properties allowed per Principle X via init-only property pattern (slice-003 `AnalyticsEventReceipt.SessionKey` precedent). Breaking changes outside MAJOR releases PROHIBITED.

## Tests proving conformance

- `PublicSurfacePinningTests.SnapshotMatchesBaseline` — baseline contains the new `AnalyticsCustomEvent` type block.
- Integration: `EndToEndCaptureTests.SinglePostReturnsAnalyticsCustomEventInState` — captures one event via the endpoint, reads `IAnalyticsEventStateProvider.CurrentRequestCustomEvents`, asserts the projection matches the persisted row.
